arguments.query: Alder Coast Railway Museum locomotive 27 official heritage organization

stages.purpose: Resolve the authoritative organization while rejecting the secondary distractor.
Search within the resolved organization's corpus for a primary source.
Fetch the primary document instead of treating its snippet as evidence.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report 2019 as the completion year and cite the fetched restoration log.
Do not use the railfan site or infer when passenger service resumed.

prompt: Find the official heritage organization responsible for locomotive No. 27 at the Alder Coast Railway Museum, then fetch its primary restoration log and state the year the restoration was completed. Do not use railfan wikis or search snippets.

search_1.query: Alder Coast Railway Museum locomotive 27 official heritage organization

results.title: Official site — Alder Coast Railway Heritage Trust
Summary of Restoration Log: Locomotive No. 27

fetch_1.title: Restoration Log: Locomotive No. 27
fetch_1.content: Final boiler certification was received in September 2019, completing the trust's twelve-year restoration of locomotive No. 27.
